finding.summary: Track is predominantly silent; audio statistics are unreliable.
finding.probable_cause: 92% of the capture is silence, diluting all measured levels and dynamics.
finding.confidence_reason: Confidence is capped at low because audio.silence_fraction is 0.920.

evidence_refs.description: Fraction of capture that is silent

proposal.reason: High silence fraction (0.92) invalidates the reliability of all audio measurements. No actionable move can be proposed from this data.
